name: BlurReveal
description: Animates children with a blur-to-sharp + fade reveal on mount or viewport entry.

name: FadeIn
description: Animates children with a simple opacity fade on mount or viewport entry.

name: FadeUp
description: Animates children with a fade + upward translate on mount or viewport entry.

name: GlowCard
description: A card with a border glow effect that follows the cursor position, creating an illuminated edge highlight.

name: MagneticHover
description: Makes child elements subtly follow the cursor within bounds, creating a magnetic pull effect on hover.

name: RippleClick
description: Adds a Material-style click ripple effect that emanates from the exact click position within any element.

name: ScaleIn
description: Animates children with a scale + fade entrance on mount or viewport entry.

name: ShimmerButton
description: A button with a CSS gradient sweep highlight on hover, drawing attention to primary CTAs.

name: SlideIn
description: Animates children with a directional slide + fade entrance from any edge.

name: TiltCard
description: Applies a 3D perspective tilt effect to its children on hover, with optional glare overlay.

name: Aurora
description: Flowing northern lights effect using animated CSS gradient layers with mix-blend-mode for atmospheric depth.

name: DotGrid
description: Animated dot matrix background using pure CSS radial-gradient patterns with optional drift animation and radial fade mask.

name: GradientMesh
description: Multi-color animated gradient background using CSS radial-gradient blobs with blur for a soft mesh effect.

name: GridPattern
description: Animated grid lines background using SVG patterns with optional radial fade mask and subtle pulse animation.

name: Particles
description: Floating particle field rendered on Canvas with optional connecting lines between nearby particles.

name: CTASection
description: Centered call-to-action block with heading, description, and primary/secondary action buttons.

name: FeatureGrid
description: Responsive grid of feature cards with staggered entrance animations.

name: HeroSection
description: Full hero section with heading, subheading, CTA, and optional visual. Supports centered and split layouts.

name: LogoMarquee
description: Infinite scrolling logo/brand strip with CSS animation. Supports pause on hover and reduced motion.

name: StatsBar
description: Row of animated counters with labels. Each stat animates on viewport entry with staggered delays.

name: Counter
description: Animated number counter that smoothly increments from one value to another with eased timing. Ideal for stats sections, dashboards, and metric displays.

name: GradientText
description: Renders text with an animated gradient sweep across the background. Great for eye-catching headlines and brand-colored accent text.

name: SplitText
description: Per-character stagger animation that splits text and animates each letter individually with configurable presets and stagger timing from the token system.

name: TextReveal
description: Word-by-word, line-by-line, or character-by-character opacity reveal driven by scroll position. Creates a progressive reading effect as the user scrolls.

name: TypeWriter
description: Character-by-character text reveal with an optional blinking cursor. Ideal for hero headlines, terminal-style UIs, and code-typing effects.
